html:
2026-0172
2026-02-26IRCCDepartment of Citizenship and Immigration Act
Immigration and Refugee Protection ActExtension of the 2019 Canada-Prince Edward Island Immigration AgreementOrder authorizing that the Minister of Citizenship and Immigration enter into an agreement with the Government of Prince Edward Island in order to (1) extend the validity of the Canada Prince Edward Island Immigration Agreement until March 12, 2027 and to provide for the parties to further extend the Agreement until March 12, 2028; and (2) amend the Agreement to align with the Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugees Protection Regulations (Provincial Nominee Program).N/A
act:
Department of Citizenship and Immigration Act
Immigration and Refugee Protection Act
subject: Extension of the 2019 Canada-Prince Edward Island Immigration Agreement
precis: Order authorizing that the Minister of Citizenship and Immigration enter into an agreement with the Government of Prince Edward Island in order to (1) extend the validity of the Canada Prince Edward Island Immigration Agreement until March 12, 2027 and to provide for the parties to further extend the Agreement until March 12, 2028; and (2) amend the Agreement to align with the Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugees Protection Regulations (Provincial Nominee Program).
